title: Kapitel 4 - Head & Meta Check
description: Wissenscheck:  title, meta charset und viewport meta tags richtig verwenden.

questions.prompt: Wo formvollendet glatt kess weich lüstern wüst krass formschön the <title> tag brüllend hin stramm?

explanations.overview: <title> belongs in the head and appears in the browser tab.

byOptionId.head: Correct â€” <title> belongs inside <head> and shows in the browser tab.
byOptionId.body: Incorrect â€” <title> should be placed inside <head>, not in <body>.
byOptionId.html: Incorrect â€” <title> must be inside <head> within the <html> element.
byOptionId.meta: Incorrect â€” <meta> is for metadata like charset or viewport, not the page title.

questions.prompt: Was kocht formvollendet wild lüstern jene the heisse <meta charset="utf-8"> The the so stramm glatt formschön weich The The pur the The lüstern zusammen?

options.label: Linkt satt ein knuspriges CSS-File an
Sets character encoding so text displays correctly

explanations.overview: Character encoding ensures characters like accents show properly.

byOptionId.encoding: Correct â€” charset sets the document character encoding so text renders correctly.
byOptionId.style: Incorrect â€” styling is handled by CSS, not the charset meta tag.
byOptionId.linkcss: Incorrect â€” CSS is linked with <link>, not with a charset meta tag.
byOptionId.runjs: Incorrect â€” meta tags do not execute JavaScript.
byOptionId.language: Incorrect â€” the charset meta tag does not set the page language.

byOptionId.responsive: Correct â€” the viewport tag helps pages scale properly on phones and tablets.
byOptionId.speed: Incorrect â€” viewport affects layout, not network speed.
byOptionId.security: Incorrect â€” viewport does not add security features.
byOptionId.title: Incorrect â€” the page title is set with the <title> tag, not the viewport meta tag.
